name: Maple Syrup Bread
recipeIngredient: 2 cups unbleached white flour (I use Robin Hood)
1 cup whole wheat flour (I use Robin Hood)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1/2 teaspoon more yeast than specified for your bread machine model.
2. Consider purchasing a larger pack of yeast from the store, as it is significantly cheaper than small envelopes. For example, Red Star yeast costs about $3 for 2 or 3 pounds.
3. Combine all ingredients in the bread machine and process according to the manufacturer's instructions.
